    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    Bomb
    Represents a single placed bomb.
    BombBlastTest
     
    BombDamageBuff
     
    BombRangeBuff
     
    Buff
    Base class for all map pickups that modify a Character's stats.
    BuffTest
     
    Character
    Base class for player characters.
    CharacterTest
     
    EasyEnemy
     
    ElectricCharacter
     
    Element
     
    ElementUtil
    Calculates elemental damage multipliers.
    ElementUtilTest
     
    Enemy
    Base class for all enemies.
    EnemySpawner
    Owns all enemy-spawn logic that previously cluttered GameController.
    EnemyTest
     
    FireCharacter
     
    GameController
    GameController is responsible for: • Wiring JavaFX timers • Handling keyboard / mouse input • Rendering the grid • Delegating everything else to domain classes It does NOT contain movement AI, blast-zone math, spawn logic, or score math.
    GameOverController
     
    GameProgress
     
    GameProgressTest
     
    HardEnemy
     
    HealBuff
     
    HomeController
     
    Launcher
     
    Level
     
    Main
     
    MapTest
     
    MaxBombBuff
     
    MediumEnemy
     
    Rock
     
    RuleController
     
    ScoreManager
    Tracks kill count and goal.
    ScoreManagerTest
     
    Seaweed
     
    SettingsController
     
    ShieldBadgeStyle
    Shared inline JavaFX style strings for the shield badge label.
    ShieldBuff
     
    Skillable
     
    SoundManager
     
    StageData
     
    StageDataTest
     
    StageSelectController
     
    Status
     
    Tile
     
    WaterCharacter
